item.title: The Best Noise-Canceling Headphones for Traveling Are $50 Off
item.description: With excellent noise canceling, the QuietComfort Ultra 2 would love to join you on your next long-haul flight.

item.title: Meta and Other Tech Companies Ban OpenClaw Over Cybersecurity Concerns
item.description: Security experts have urged people to be cautious with the viral agentic AI tool, known for being highly capable but also wildly unpredictable.

item.title: The Curling Controversy at the Winter Olympics Isn’t What You Think

item.title: Inside the Homeland Security Forum Where ICE Agents Talk Shit About Other Agents
item.description: Forum members have discussed their discomfort with mass deportation efforts, debate how federal agents have interacted with civilians, and complain ab...

item.title: The Simplest Android App for Scanning Documents
